notes: Used as a term of endearment or to describe someone kind and sweet. Also used in letter salutations (Liebe/Lieber). The superlative 'am liebsten' is commonly used to express preference (ich hätte am liebsten...).

sentences.german: Sie ist ein liebes Kind und hilft immer gerne.
sentences.english: She is a sweet child and always likes to help.

sentences.german: Liebe Maria, ich schreibe dir aus Berlin.
sentences.english: Dear Maria, I am writing to you from Berlin.
